endpoints.name: POST /barcode/decode
endpoints.description: Decode a Barcode image and return the cotents if successful
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /barcode/decode/types
endpoints.description: Get the supported barcode types for the decoding process.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /barcode/encode
endpoints.description: Get a Bar Code image for the given barcode number
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /barcode/encode/types
endpoints.description: Get the supported barcode types for encoding / image generation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.
